speaker: seller

args.message: Welcome to our dealership! Check out this well-equipped 2016 Chevrolet Tahoe LT, perfect for active families. With leather seating, a premium Bose audio system, and third-row capability, it's ready for all your adventures. This Tahoe has been dealer-serviced and runs strong with the proven 5.3L V8 engine. At an asking price of just $24,900, it’s a deal you won’t want to miss!
